organs.note: Narrow research panel (Moteur Sullivan) - simple search doesn't need much width, placed flush left
Hero canvas for Multiverse - 2-3 iframe columns need substantial width (60% of safe area), centered with 20px gap from left sidebar
Arbitrage panel (Sullivan synthesis) - slightly wider for readability, positioned flush right
Collapsible Trace footer spans full width to align with all columns above, showing research results per LLM column
Workspace file explorer - medium width for tree navigation, flush left
Forge main canvas - accommodates split editor + roadmap (2 internal zones), asymmetrically wider than sidebars
Majordome chat panel - narrower command interface for Sullivan pilotage, 20px gap from main
Terminal and audit log - full width status bar for command output and build tracking
Intent history (Le Pourquoi) - narrow semantic timeline, minimal width for text history
Genome Viewer hero - large canvas for explosive organ visualization (66%+ width), asymmetrically centered with 20px gaps
Pedagogy panel - two internal zones (Q&A + HCI) stacked vertically, narrow educational sidebar
Contextual explanation footer - appears on component hover, full width for source code display and usage docs
Configuration secrets panel - medium width for API keys and service settings (Netlify, Vercel forms)
Dual deployment view - accommodates Sullivan chat + service iframe side-by-side, central asymmetric mass
Guide Sullivan with Vision - wider right panel for capture button and Gemini Vision analysis results, 20px gap from main
